_comment: Canonical Source Registry (issue #58). Single source of truth for the V2-Sharp Step 2 (Game Line Research) feed list. Role-keyed and sport-aware. Active roles: primary_splits, secondary_splits, line_movement. The stale list is the never-fetch set (confirmed 403/blocked). Invariant enforced by source_registry.py: no URL appears in both an active list and the stale list. Edited by the self-heal step (issue #61); read by the skills and Source Health tooling. Do not hand-edit during a run.

primary_splits.note: Handle % + Ticket % aggregated from multiple books, 15-min refresh. Primary RLM confirmation source. Swap the /mlb/ path segment for /nba/ or /nhl/.
DK's own Handle % + Ticket % (largest U.S. book by volume).

line_movement.note: Opening vs. current lines across 8+ books. Sport-templated: replace [sport] with mlb/nba/nhl/nfl.

stale.note: Confirmed blocked — never fetch (the contests.covers.com consensus page still works and stays an active secondary source).
API endpoint — use CLEATZ instead if this 403s (the splits HTML page stays an active primary source).
